creator: zi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Olivier Cochard from comment #10)

I think if we're going to bundle the enterprise-numbers file within the ipmitool port, it should probably go in %%DATADIR%%.  I don't envision a scenario where someone else wants this file and decides to bring in ipmitool as the way to get it.

So, in that scenario, we'd probably look to break it out into its own port and then for now, we just keep it in an ipmitool-specific directory.

Otherwise, this seems fine to me!
